title: Label Mode
description: Type definition for the label display mode in form fields. Determines how labels are positioned and displayed relative to form inputs.

sections.title: Type Definition
sections.description: The AXLabelMode type definition showing all available label modes

props.name: AXLabelMode
props.description: Union type defining the available label modes for form fields. 'static' keeps the label in a fixed position, 'floating' animates the label when focused, and 'over' places the label over the input field.
